title: Honoraria Request Memo (DocuSign)
content: DocuSign form for requesting an honorarium — a one-time payment for participation to a person who is not an employee of, and not a student of, Morgan State University. Payments must reflect market-rate limitations. International honoraria payments require guidance from MSU Accounts Payable before submission. Route the completed form via DocuSign to the MSU ORA signing group; questions to ora-docusign@morgan.edu.
